changeSet.author: odysejapka
changeSet.comment: Create spontan_result table for storing spontan scoring results per performance
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spontan_result ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, performance_id INTEGER UNIQUE NOT NULL, results JSONB, raw_spontan DOUBLE PRECISION, CONSTRAINT fk_spontan_result_performance FOREIGN KEY (performance_id) REFERENCES performance(id) );
